subcodes.title: Words to Zoroastrian pilgrims, spoken on 1913-11-10
subcodes.first_line: Persia will become luminous. Her future grandeur shall by far eclipse her past recorded glory.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @past, present and future of Iran, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
